item.name: Wind-up Alisaie
item.description:
For those who believe the better half deserves more time in the spotlight.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Alisaie minion.
item.tooltip:
For the future of Eorzea!
  - Alisaie (and Alphinaud)
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 to all enemies within range.
